title: France picks mayors in test of political mood ahead of 2027 polls
subhed: Polling stations across mainland France have opened for the first round of the municipal elections: while a majority of municipalities will know their mayor as early as Sunday, the outcome in major cities remains highly uncertain.

title: Iran warns against wider war as Trump asks allies to escort ships
subhed: Donald Trump asked world leaders on Saturday to send ships to the Strait of Hormuz to escort tankers.

title: How food scandals are fueling anxiety
subhed: Cadmium, pesticides, PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) and other harmful substances permeate our food and contaminate us.

title: Tinder, WeWard, Lime: French government tests new tools to fight voter abstention
subhed: To encourage French citizens, especially young people, to vote in the municipal elections on March 15 and 22, the government is multiplying partnerships with private platforms. The latest: WeWard, an app that encourages walking to polling stations.

title: Tradition done right: Five Paris restaurants reimagining the classics
subhed: Are you a fan of French cuisine classics such as 'œufs en meurette' (poached eggs in red wine sauce), 'navarin d'agneau' (lamb stew) and apple tart? Discover our selection of five Paris restaurants that awaken both the appetite and a sense of nostalgia.

title: Paris's museum of medieval art explores unicorns of all kinds

title: Luxury-loving Belgian cocaine kingpin 'Finger Cutter' to face justice
